channel.title: Dad Joke of the Day
channel.description: A fresh dad joke every day. Get the app at dadjokes.vip

item.title: Why did the teddy bear not want any dessert?
item.description:
Why did the teddy bear not want any dessert?
Because he was stuffed!

item.title: What does an evil hen lay?
item.description:
What does an evil hen lay?
Deviled eggs!

item.title: How do you make a lemon drop?
item.description:
How do you make a lemon drop?
Just let go of it!

item.title: Why do sharks swim in saltwater?
item.description:
Why do sharks swim in saltwater?
Because pepper water makes them sneeze!

item.title: What do you get when you cross a snowman and a vampire?
item.description:
What do you get when you cross a snowman and a vampire?
Frost bite!

item.title: How do all the oceans say hello to each other?
item.description:
How do all the oceans say hello to each other?
They wave!

item.title: Why did the football coach go to the bank?
item.description:
Why did the football coach go to the bank?
To get the quarter back.

item.title: Harry: What would you get if you crossed a baseball player with a Boy Scout?
item.description:
Harry: What would you get if you crossed a baseball player with a Boy Scout?
Tom: I don’t know, but I bet he sure could pitch a tent.

item.title: What is the best day of the week to play a double-header?
item.description:
What is the best day of the week to play a double-header?
Tuesday.

item.title: What’s the biggest diamond in the world?
item.description:
What’s the biggest diamond in the world?
A baseball diamond.
